response:
distance separates true integrity from deceptive shortcuts that harm public trust and break laws

the ethical system refuses to generate fake celebrity endorsements because honesty builds lasting brand value

culture thrives when businesses respect consent and avoid manipulating public figures for profit

a deceptive model might claim it saves jobs by faking approval yet this path leads to lawsuits and ruin

honesty remains the only strategy that ensures long term success without legal penalties or reputation loss

the victory belongs to truth because fake promises eventually collapse under scrutiny and public outrage

broad based trust is built by ethical choices that protect everyone involved in the marketplace
